    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        
    End Sub

    Private Sub BarCode_Print_CN7(ByVal strSerial As String)

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")

        If CN7_BArcode_Mode = 1 Then

            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,6,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        ElseIf CN7_BArcode_Mode = 2 Then

            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,5,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        End If

        If CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) > 630 And CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) < 1530 Then 'AM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,50^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & srcColorCode.Text & " AM " & OPTION_CARTYPE & "^FS")
        Else 'PM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,50^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & srcColorCode.Text & " PM " & OPTION_CARTYPE & "^FS")
        End If
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,90^A0N,34,18^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,130^A0N,34,30^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")

        If OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Or OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,170^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner FWD : " & RECL_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & RECL_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,250^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner End Angle : " & PWR_END_ANGLE & "^FS")
        End If

        If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,210^A0N,34,30^FD" & "L/SUPT FWD : " & LSUPT_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & LSUPT_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
        End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub Barcode_Print_AD_PD_AE()

        Dim EndSerial As String = ""
        Dim SAB_SERIAL_TMP As String = "00000000000000"
        Dim SAB_TQ1_TMP As String = "00"
        Dim SAB_TQ2_TMP As String = "00"
        Dim AMPM As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TABLE_MAIN WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

                Try
                    SAB_SERIAL_TMP = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST03_SAB_SERIAL").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try

                Try
                    SAB_TQ1_TMP = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST03_SAB_TQ1").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try

                Try
                    SAB_TQ2_TMP = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST03_SAB_TQ2").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try

            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try

        '2020 02 14 0001 88888-00000

        'Mid(SAB_SERIAL_TMP, 1, 14) & _

        'tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + LOT_START + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text

        If OPTION_CARTYPE = "AD" Then

            EndSerial = "ADF" &
                                 Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 7, 5) & srcColorCode.Text & "     " &
                                 Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 3, 10) &
                                 "[)>&06" & "_1d" & "VDE4V" & "_1d" & "P" &
                                 Mid(SAB_TQ1_TMP, 1, 2) & Mid(SAB_TQ2_TMP, 1, 2)

        ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "PD" Then

            EndSerial = "PDF" &
                                             Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 7, 5) & srcColorCode.Text & "     " &
                                             Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 3, 10) &
                                             "[)>&06" & "_1d" & "VDE4V" & "_1d" & "P" &
                                             Mid(SAB_TQ1_TMP, 1, 2) & Mid(SAB_TQ2_TMP, 1, 2)

        ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AE" Then

            EndSerial = "AEF" &
                                             Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 7, 5) & srcColorCode.Text & "     " &
                                             Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 3, 10) &
                                             "[)>&06" & "_1d" & "VDE4V" & "_1d" & "P" &
                                             Mid(SAB_TQ1_TMP, 1, 2) & Mid(SAB_TQ2_TMP, 1, 2)

        End If

        srcEndSErial.Text = EndSerial

        If CInt(Format(Now, "HHmm")) >= 650 And CInt(Format(Now, "HHmm")) <= 1530 Then
            AMPM = "AM"
        Else
            AMPM = "PM"
        End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "70" & "," & "60" & "^BXN," & "8" & ",200,0,0,,^FH^FD" & EndSerial & "^FS")

        If CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) > 630 And CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) < 1530 Then 'AM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,55^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & " AM " & OPTION_CARTYPE & "^FS")
        Else 'PM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,55^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & " PM " & OPTION_CARTYPE & "^FS")
        End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,90^A0N,34,18^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,130^A0N,34,30^FD" & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 1, 8) & AMPM & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 9, 4) & "^FS")

        If OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Or OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,170^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner FWD : " & RECL_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & RECL_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,250^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner End Angle : " & PWR_END_ANGLE & "^FS")
        End If

        If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,210^A0N,34,30^FD" & "L/SUPT FWD : " & LSUPT_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & LSUPT_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
        End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Function Create_End_Barcode() As String

        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"
        Dim TMP As String = ""
        Dim _4M_1 As String
        Dim _4M_2 As String = ""
        Dim _4M_3 As String
        Dim _4M_4 As String
        Dim _4M_CODE As String
        Dim i As Integer
        ' SAB 시리얼은 Check_DB()에서 미리 캐시됨 → DB 재조회 불필요 (바코드 출력 지연 방지)
        Dim SAB_SERIAL_TMP As String = SAB_SERIAL_CACHE
        Dim SplitTmp() As String
        Dim SabTmp As String = ""

        _4M_1 = "1"
        _4M_2 = LINE
        If CInt(Format(Now, "HHmm")) >= 800 And CInt(Format(Now, "HHmm")) <= 1530 Then
            _4M_3 = "A"
        Else
            _4M_3 = "B"
        End If
        _4M_4 = "1"
        _4M_CODE = _4M_1 & _4M_2 & _4M_3 & _4M_4

        If SAB_SERIAL_TMP = "" Then

            CN7_BArcode_Mode = 1

            TMP =
                "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS &
                "V" & "PB30" & GS &
                "P" & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 7, 5) & srcColorCode.Text & GS &
                "S" & "" & GS &
                "E" & "" & GS &
                "T" & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 3, 6) & _4M_CODE & "A" & "000" & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 9, 4) & GS &
                "M" & "" & GS &
                "C" & "" & GS &
                RS & EOT

        Else

            CN7_BArcode_Mode = 2

            SplitTmp = Split(SAB_SERIAL_TMP, Chr(29))

            For i = 1 To UBound(SplitTmp) - 1
                If i < UBound(SplitTmp) - 1 Then
                    SabTmp = SabTmp & SplitTmp(i) & GS
                Else
                    SabTmp = SabTmp & SplitTmp(i) & GS
                End If
            Next

            TMP =
                "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS &
                "V" & "PB30" & GS &
                "P" & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 7, 5) & srcColorCode.Text & GS &
                "S" & "" & GS &
                "E" & "" & GS &
                "T" & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 3, 6) & _4M_CODE & "A" & "000" & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 9, 4) & GS &
                "M" & "" & GS &
                "C" & "" & GS &
                RS & EOT &
                "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & SabTmp & RS & EOT

        End If

        srcEndSErial.Text = TMP

        Return TMP

    End Function


    Private Sub Load_PArt(ByVal str As String)
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

                StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

                srcPartNo.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value)
                srcPartName.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)

                LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)

                OPTION_CARTYPE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CAR").Value)
                OPTION_LHRH = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LHRH").Value)
                OPTION_RECL = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_RECL").Value)
                OPTION_VENT = SafeBool(Rs.Fields("OPTION_VENT").Value)
                OPTION_LSUPT = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LSUPT").Value)

                TARGET_RECL_SN = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("RECL_SN").Value)
                TARGET_SAB_SN = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("SAB_SN").Value)
                TARGET_LSUPT_SN = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("LSUPT_SN").Value)

                If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
                    srcLSUPT.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcLSUPT.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN7" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AD" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AE" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "PD" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN8" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If

                If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                    srcLH.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcRH.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                    srcRH.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcLH.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If OPTION_RECL = "MNL" Then
                    srcMNL.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcEMC.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Then
                    srcMNL.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcEMS.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
                    srcMNL.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS.BackColor = Color.Black
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Then
                    srcMNL.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcIMS.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If TARGET_SAB_SN <> "0" Then
                    srcSAB.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcSAB.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If OPTION_VENT = True Then
                    srcVENT.BackColor = Color.Black
                Else
                    srcVENT.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                wStep = 4

            Else

                wStep = 3.2

            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private indexEnsured As Boolean = False
    Private Sub EnsureIndex()
        If indexEnsured Then Exit Sub
        Try
            Sql_Connect.Execute("IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.indexes WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TABLE_MAIN') AND name = 'IX_TABLE_MAIN_SERIAL_NUMBER') " &
                                "CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_TABLE_MAIN_SERIAL_NUMBER ON TABLE_MAIN (SERIAL_NUMBER)")
            indexEnsured = True
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_DB(ByVal str As String)
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            EnsureIndex()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WITH (NOLOCK) where SERIAL_NUMBER ='" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

                ' 바코드 출력에 필요한 SAB 시리얼 미리 캐시 (Create_End_Barcode DB 재조회 방지)
                Try
                    SAB_SERIAL_CACHE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST03_SAB_SERIAL").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    SAB_SERIAL_CACHE = ""
                End Try

                Try
                    srcST01.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST01_DECISION").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    srcST01.Text = "NG"
                End Try

                Try
                    srcST03.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST03_DECISION").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    srcST03.Text = "NG"
                End Try

                Try
                    srcST05.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST05_DECISION").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    srcST05.Text = "NG"
                End Try

                Try
                    srcNoiseTest.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_DECISION").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    srcNoiseTest.Text = "NG"
                End Try

                Try
                    srcNoiseTest.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_DECISION").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    srcNoiseTest.Text = "NG"
                End Try

                Try
                    RECL_FWD_NOISE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_RECL_FWD_NOISE").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    RECL_FWD_NOISE = ""
                End Try

                Try
                    RECL_BWD_NOISE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_RECL_BWD_NOISE").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    RECL_BWD_NOISE = ""
                End Try

                Try
                    LSUPT_FWD_NOISE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_LSUPT_FWD_NOISE").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    LSUPT_FWD_NOISE = ""
                End Try

                Try
                    LSUPT_BWD_NOISE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_LSUPT_BWD_NOISE").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    LSUPT_BWD_NOISE = ""
                End Try

                Try
                    PWR_END_ANGLE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_RECL_END_ANGLE").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    PWR_END_ANGLE = ""
                End Try

            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_Color()

        If srcST01.Text = "OK" Then
            srcST01.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            srcST01.Text = "NG"
            srcST01.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If
        If srcST03.Text = "OK" Then
            srcST03.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            srcST03.Text = "NG"
            srcST03.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If
        If srcST05.Text = "OK" Then
            srcST05.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            srcST05.Text = "NG"
            srcST05.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If
        If srcNoiseTest.Text = "OK" Then
            srcNoiseTest.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            srcNoiseTest.Text = "NG"
            srcNoiseTest.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If


        If srcST01.Text <> "NG" And srcST03.Text <> "NG" And srcST05.Text <> "NG" And srcNoiseTest.Text <> "NG" Then
            srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
            srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            srcTotal_Decision.Text = "NG"
            srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(ByVal str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()
        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
        End If
    End Sub


    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        Do
            Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
            Else
                sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                    If sRecvData.Length = 28 Then
                        If Mid(sRecvData, 11, 1) = "E" Then
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = Mid(sRecvData, 11, 16)
                            ' 최초 인식 시 캡처
                            If RFID_TAG_ID = "" Then RFID_TAG_ID = Mid(sRecvData, 11, 16)
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                    Else
                        Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                    End If
                    sRecvData = ""
                    Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If
            End If
        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function Create_Serial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ST01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

            tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step.Text = wStep

        If (PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 0 And wStep <> 0) And (wStep < 4 Or wStep > 9) Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            wStep = 0
        End If

        'If (wStep > 0 And wStep <= 2) And (wStep >= 6 And wStep <= 8) Then
        FLAG_RFID_RUN = True
        'Else
        '    FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        'End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then
                wStep = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            RFID_TAG_ID = "" ' 새 사이클 시작 - 태그ID 클리어
            Init_Control()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            WORK_PARTNO = ""
            'Check_Now()
            wStep = 3.1

        ElseIf wStep = 3.1 Then

            If RFID_TAG_ID.Length = 16 Then
                Try
                    Dim serial As String = LoadPallet(RFID_TAG_ID)
                    If serial = "" Then
                        PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", "2") 'PASS
                        wStep = 100
                    Else
                        srcSerialNumber.Text = serial
                        Load_PArt(Mid(serial, 13, 11))
                        ' 칼라코드 추출
                        If Len(serial) > 23 Then
                            srcColorCode.Text = Mid(serial, 24)
                        End If
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING = "0100000000"

            If OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "MNL" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "3"
            End If
            If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If TARGET_SAB_SN = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 5, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 5, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_VENT = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 7, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 7, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN7" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "3"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "PD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "4"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN8" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "5"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", PLC_STRING)
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(12) = 1 Then
                wStep = 6
            Else
                wStep = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            'srcSerialNumber.Text = Create_Serial()
            wStep = 7

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            Tmr_Count = 0
            wStep = 8

        ElseIf wStep = 8 Then

            wStep = 9

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then ' DB 조회
            Try
                Check_DB(srcSerialNumber.Text)
                Check_Color()
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 9.1

        ElseIf wStep = 9.1 Then ' 바코드 출력
            Try
                If srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK" Then
                    If OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN8" Then
                        BarCode_Print_CN7(Create_End_Barcode)
                    Else
                        Barcode_Print_AD_PD_AE()
                    End If
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 10

        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(2) = 1 Then
                Try
                    Save_DB(srcSerialNumber.Text)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
                wStep = 10.01
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 10.01 Then
            Try
                DeletePallet(RFID_TAG_ID)
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 10.02

        ElseIf wStep = 10.02 Then
            Try
                Save_Count()
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 10.03

        ElseIf wStep = 10.03 Then
            Try
                Init_Grid()
                Load_Grid()
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 10.1

        ElseIf wStep = 10.1 Then

            LAbel_RF_CHECK.Text = "OK"
            LAbel_RF_CHECK.BackColor = Color.White
            wStep = 11

        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then


            wStep = 12

        ElseIf wStep = 12 Then

            wStep = 13

        ElseIf wStep = 13 Then

            wStep = 14

        ElseIf wStep = 14 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", "0000000000")
                Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
                wStep = 0
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Init_Grid()

        With Grid1

            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .DrawMode = FlexCell.DrawModeEnum.OwnerDraw
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Cols = 3
            .Rows = 1
            .FixedRows = 2
            .FrozenBottomRows = 1

            .Column(1).Locked = True
            .Column(2).Locked = True

            For i As Integer = 1 To 2

                .Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            Next

            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 220
            .Column(2).Width = 170

            .Cell(0, 1).Text = "품번"
            .Cell(0, 2).Text = "생산수량"

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_Grid()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly

            Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,Count_ST15 FROM Table_Part WITH (NOLOCK)", Sql_Connect)

            Rs.MoveFirst()

            If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
            Else
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    If SafeInt(Rs.Fields("Count_ST15").Value) <> 0 Then
                        Grid1.AddItem(SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value) & Chr(9) &
                                      SafeInt(Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST15").Value))
                    End If
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Reset_Count()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Dim tmp As Integer

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,COUNT_ST15 FROM Table_Part", Sql_Connect)

            Rs.MoveFirst()
            If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
            Else
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST15").Value = "0"
                    Rs.Update()
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_Count()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Dim tmp As Integer

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,COUNT_ST15 FROM Table_Part Where Part_No = '" & srcPartNo.Text & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
            Else
                tmp = SafeInt(Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST15").Value)

                tmp = tmp + 1

                If tmp > 20000 Then tmp = 0

                Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST15").Value = tmp

                Rs.Update()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Shared appMutex As System.Threading.Mutex

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        ' 중복 실행 방지
        Dim createdNew As Boolean = False
        appMutex = New System.Threading.Mutex(True, "CN7_ST15_MUTEX", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            MessageBox.Show("프로그램이 이미 실행 중입니다.", "CN7 ST15", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            End
        End If

        Connection_Open()
        Connection_Open_MDB()

        InitializeActPlc()

        Init_Control()
        Control2Arry()
        Init_Grid()
        Load_Grid()
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        SerialOpen()

        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 = "192.168.0.110"
        FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False

        Tmr_Connect1.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect1.Start()

        FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        RF_READ_COUNT = 0

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
        End If

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect1.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If

        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.5
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            If FLAG_RFID_RUN = True Then Read_RFiD()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_READ()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 24

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "D4500" & vbLf &
                                "D4501" & vbLf &
                                "D4502" & vbLf &
                                "D4503" & vbLf &
                                "D4504" & vbLf &
                                "D4505" & vbLf &
                                "D4506" & vbLf &
                                "D4507" & vbLf &
                                "D4508" & vbLf &
                                "D4509" & vbLf &
                                "D4510" & vbLf &
                                "D4511" & vbLf &
                                "D4550" & vbLf &
                                "D4551" & vbLf &
                                "D4552" & vbLf &
                                "D4553" & vbLf &
                                "D4554" & vbLf &
                                "D4555" & vbLf &
                                "D4556" & vbLf &
                                "D4557" & vbLf &
                                "D4558" & vbLf &
                                "D4559" & vbLf &
                                "D4560" & vbLf &
                                "D4561"
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 12)
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next

            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    ' MX Component ActiveX 동적 생성 (디자이너 깨짐 방지)
    Private Sub InitializeActPlc()
        Try
            ACT_PLC1 = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
            CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
            ACT_PLC1.Enabled = True
            ACT_PLC1.Location = New System.Drawing.Point(829, 19)
            ACT_PLC1.Name = "ACT_PLC1"
            ACT_PLC1.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(32, 32)
            ACT_PLC1.Visible = False
            Me.Panel6.Controls.Add(ACT_PLC1)
            CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("ACT_PLC1 초기화 실패: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' 팔레트 조회
    Private Function LoadPallet(ByVal strPalletID As String) As String
        Dim serial As String = ""
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                serial = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
        Return serial
    End Function

    ' 팔레트 삭제 (마지막 공정)
    Private Sub DeletePallet(ByVal strPalletID As String)
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_pallet WHERE PalletID = '" & strPalletID & "'", Sql_Connect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Rs.Delete()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

End Class

    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_RFID
            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_RFID)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Printer.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Printer.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Printer.PortName = PortNumber_PRINTER
            Serial_Printer.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Printer.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Printer.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Printer Fail " & PortNumber_PRINTER)
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_CONNECT()

        'ACT_PLC1.ActNetworkNumber = 1
        'ACT_PLC1.ActStationNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActCpuType = 146

        ACT_PLC1.ActHostAddress = ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1
        If ACT_PLC1.Open <> 0 Then
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
        Else
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True
        End If

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        
    End Sub

    Private Sub BarCode_Print_CN7(ByVal strSerial As String)

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")

        If CN7_BArcode_Mode = 1 Then

            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,6,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        ElseIf CN7_BArcode_Mode = 2 Then

            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO50,50^BY5^BXN,5,200,,,,^FH^FD" & strSerial & "^FS")

        End If

        If CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) > 630 And CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) < 1530 Then 'AM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,50^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & srcColorCode.Text & " AM " & OPTION_CARTYPE & "^FS")
        Else 'PM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,50^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & srcColorCode.Text & " PM " & OPTION_CARTYPE & "^FS")
        End If
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,90^A0N,34,18^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,130^A0N,34,30^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")

        If OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Or OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,170^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner FWD : " & RECL_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & RECL_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,250^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner End Angle : " & PWR_END_ANGLE & "^FS")
        End If

        If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,210^A0N,34,30^FD" & "L/SUPT FWD : " & LSUPT_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & LSUPT_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
        End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub Barcode_Print_AD_PD_AE()

        Dim EndSerial As String = ""

        Dim SAB_TQ2_TMP As String = "00"

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TABLE_MAIN WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

                Try
                    SAB_SERIAL_TMP = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST03_SAB_SERIAL").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try

                Try

                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try

                Try
                    SAB_TQ2_TMP = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST03_SAB_TQ2").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try

            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try

        '2020 02 14 0001 88888-00000

        'Mid(SAB_SERIAL_TMP, 1, 14) & _

        'tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + LOT_START + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text

        If OPTION_CARTYPE = "AD" Then

            EndSerial = "ADF" &
                                 Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 7, 5) & srcColorCode.Text & "     " &
                                 Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 3, 10) &
                                 "[)>&06" & "_1d" & "VDE4V" & "_1d" & "P" &
                                 Mid(SAB_TQ1_TMP, 1, 2) & Mid(SAB_TQ2_TMP, 1, 2)

        ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "PD" Then

            EndSerial = "PDF" &
                                             Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 7, 5) & srcColorCode.Text & "     " &
                                             Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 3, 10) &
                                             "[)>&06" & "_1d" & "VDE4V" & "_1d" & "P" &
                                             Mid(SAB_TQ1_TMP, 1, 2) & Mid(SAB_TQ2_TMP, 1, 2)

        ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AE" Then

            EndSerial = "AEF" &
                                             Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 7, 5) & srcColorCode.Text & "     " &
                                             Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 3, 10) &
                                             "[)>&06" & "_1d" & "VDE4V" & "_1d" & "P" &
                                             Mid(SAB_TQ1_TMP, 1, 2) & Mid(SAB_TQ2_TMP, 1, 2)

        End If

        srcEndSErial.Text = EndSerial

            AMPM = "AM"
        Else
            AMPM = "PM"
        End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "70" & "," & "60" & "^BXN," & "8" & ",200,0,0,,^FH^FD" & EndSerial & "^FS")

        If CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) > 630 And CDbl(Format(Now, "HHmm")) < 1530 Then 'AM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,55^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & " AM " & OPTION_CARTYPE & "^FS")
        Else 'PM
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,30^A0N,55,55^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & " PM " & OPTION_CARTYPE & "^FS")
        End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,90^A0N,34,18^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,130^A0N,34,30^FD" & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 1, 8) & AMPM & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 9, 4) & "^FS")

        If OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Or OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,170^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner FWD : " & RECL_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & RECL_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,250^A0N,34,30^FD" & "Recliner End Angle : " & PWR_END_ANGLE & "^FS")
        End If

        If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
            Serial_Printer.Write("^FO320,210^A0N,34,30^FD" & "L/SUPT FWD : " & LSUPT_FWD_NOISE & " dB BWD : " & LSUPT_BWD_NOISE & " dB" & "^FS")
        End If

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Function Create_End_Barcode() As String

        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"
        Dim TMP As String = ""
        Dim _4M_1 As String
        Dim _4M_2 As String = ""
        Dim _4M_3 As String
        Dim _4M_4 As String
        Dim _4M_CODE As String
        Dim i As Integer
        ' SAB 시리얼은 Check_DB()에서 미리 캐시됨 → DB 재조회 불필요 (바코드 출력 지연 방지)
        Dim SAB_SERIAL_TMP As String = SAB_SERIAL_CACHE
        Dim SplitTmp() As String
        Dim SabTmp As String = ""

        _4M_1 = "1"
        _4M_2 = LINE
        If CInt(Format(Now, "HHmm")) >= 800 And CInt(Format(Now, "HHmm")) <= 1530 Then
            _4M_3 = "A"
        Else
            _4M_3 = "B"
        End If
        _4M_4 = "1"
        _4M_CODE = _4M_1 & _4M_2 & _4M_3 & _4M_4

        If SAB_SERIAL_TMP = "" Then

            CN7_BArcode_Mode = 1

            TMP =
                "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS &
                "V" & "PB30" & GS &
                "P" & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 7, 5) & srcColorCode.Text & GS &
                "S" & "" & GS &
                "E" & "" & GS &
                "T" & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 3, 6) & _4M_CODE & "A" & "000" & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 9, 4) & GS &
                "M" & "" & GS &
                "C" & "" & GS &
                RS & EOT

        Else

            CN7_BArcode_Mode = 2

            SplitTmp = Split(SAB_SERIAL_TMP, Chr(29))

            For i = 1 To UBound(SplitTmp) - 1
                If i < UBound(SplitTmp) - 1 Then
                    SabTmp = SabTmp & SplitTmp(i) & GS
                Else
                    SabTmp = SabTmp & SplitTmp(i) & GS
                End If
            Next

            TMP =
                "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS &
                "V" & "PB30" & GS &
                "P" & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 1, 5) & Mid(srcPartNo.Text, 7, 5) & srcColorCode.Text & GS &
                "S" & "" & GS &
                "E" & "" & GS &
                "T" & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 3, 6) & _4M_CODE & "A" & "000" & Mid(srcSerialNumber.Text, 9, 4) & GS &
                "M" & "" & GS &
                "C" & "" & GS &
                RS & EOT &
                "#" & "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS & SabTmp & RS & EOT

        End If

        srcEndSErial.Text = TMP

        Return TMP

    End Function


    Private Sub Load_PArt(ByVal str As String)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

                StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

                srcPartNo.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value)

                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.White

                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AD" Then

                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.White

                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AE" Then

                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "PD" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN8" Then
                    srcCN7.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcAE.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcPD.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcCN8.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If

                If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                    srcLH.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcRH.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                    srcRH.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcLH.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If OPTION_RECL = "MNL" Then
                    srcMNL.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcEMC.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Then
                    srcMNL.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcEMS.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS.BackColor = Color.White
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
                    srcMNL.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcIMS.BackColor = Color.Black
                ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Then
                    srcMNL.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMC.BackColor = Color.White
                    srcEMS.BackColor = Color.Black
                    srcIMS.BackColor = Color.White
                End If

                If TARGET_SAB_SN <> "0" Then

                Else

                If OPTION_VENT = True Then

                End If

        End Try

    Private indexEnsured As Boolean = False
    Private Sub EnsureIndex()
        If indexEnsured Then Exit Sub
        Try
            Sql_Connect.Execute("IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.indexes WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TABLE_MAIN') AND name = 'IX_TABLE_MAIN_SERIAL_NUMBER') " &
                                "CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_TABLE_MAIN_SERIAL_NUMBER ON TABLE_MAIN (SERIAL_NUMBER)")
            indexEnsured = True
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_DB(ByVal str As String)
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()
            EnsureIndex()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WITH (NOLOCK) where SERIAL_NUMBER ='" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

                ' 바코드 출력에 필요한 SAB 시리얼 미리 캐시 (Create_End_Barcode DB 재조회 방지)
                Try
                    SAB_SERIAL_CACHE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST03_SAB_SERIAL").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    SAB_SERIAL_CACHE = ""
                End Try

                Try
                    srcST01.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST01_DECISION").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    srcST01.Text = "NG"
                End Try

                Try
                    srcST03.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST03_DECISION").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    srcST03.Text = "NG"
                End Try

                Try
                    srcST05.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("ST05_DECISION").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    srcST05.Text = "NG"
                End Try

                Try
                    srcNoiseTest.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_DECISION").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    srcNoiseTest.Text = "NG"
                End Try

                Try
                    srcNoiseTest.Text = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_DECISION").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    srcNoiseTest.Text = "NG"
                End Try

                Try
                    RECL_FWD_NOISE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_RECL_FWD_NOISE").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    RECL_FWD_NOISE = ""
                End Try

                Try
                    RECL_BWD_NOISE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_RECL_BWD_NOISE").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    RECL_BWD_NOISE = ""
                End Try

                Try
                    LSUPT_FWD_NOISE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_LSUPT_FWD_NOISE").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    LSUPT_FWD_NOISE = ""
                End Try

                Try
                    LSUPT_BWD_NOISE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_LSUPT_BWD_NOISE").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    LSUPT_BWD_NOISE = ""
                End Try

                Try
                    PWR_END_ANGLE = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("TEST_RECL_END_ANGLE").Value)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    PWR_END_ANGLE = ""
                End Try

            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_Color()

        If srcST01.Text = "OK" Then
            srcST01.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            srcST01.Text = "NG"
            srcST01.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If
        If srcST03.Text = "OK" Then
            srcST03.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            srcST03.Text = "NG"
            srcST03.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If
        If srcST05.Text = "OK" Then
            srcST05.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            srcST05.Text = "NG"
            srcST05.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If
        If srcNoiseTest.Text = "OK" Then
            srcNoiseTest.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            srcNoiseTest.Text = "NG"
            srcNoiseTest.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If


        If srcST01.Text <> "NG" And srcST03.Text <> "NG" And srcST05.Text <> "NG" And srcNoiseTest.Text <> "NG" Then
            srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
            srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            srcTotal_Decision.Text = "NG"
            srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(ByVal str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()
        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Dim cmd() As Byte = {&H2, &H2, &H0, &H3, &H7, &H3, &HE8, &H3}
            Serial_RFID.Write(cmd, 0, cmd.Length)
        End If
    End Sub


    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        Do
            Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
            Else
                sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                    If sRecvData.Length = 28 Then
                        If Mid(sRecvData, 11, 1) = "E" Then
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = Mid(sRecvData, 11, 16)
                            ' 최초 인식 시 캡처
                            If RFID_TAG_ID = "" Then RFID_TAG_ID = Mid(sRecvData, 11, 16)
                        Else
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                    Else
                        Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                    End If
                    sRecvData = ""
                    Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If
            End If
        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function Create_Serial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ST01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

            tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick

        For i As Integer = 0 To 47
            If D_Value(i) = 1 Then
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.White
            End If
        Next i

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_Now()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Work WITH (NOLOCK)", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                WORK_PARTNO = SafeStr(Rs.Fields("WORK_PARTNO").Value)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step.Text = wStep

        If (PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 0 And wStep <> 0) And (wStep < 4 Or wStep > 9) Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            wStep = 0
        End If

        'If (wStep > 0 And wStep <= 2) And (wStep >= 6 And wStep <= 8) Then
        FLAG_RFID_RUN = True
        'Else
        '    FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        'End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then
                wStep = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            RFID_TAG_ID = "" ' 새 사이클 시작 - 태그ID 클리어
            Init_Control()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            WORK_PARTNO = ""
            'Check_Now()
            wStep = 3.1

        ElseIf wStep = 3.1 Then

            If RFID_TAG_ID.Length = 16 Then
                Try
                    Dim serial As String = LoadPallet(RFID_TAG_ID)
                    If serial = "" Then
                        PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", "2") 'PASS
                        wStep = 100
                    Else
                        srcSerialNumber.Text = serial
                        Load_PArt(Mid(serial, 13, 11))
                        ' 칼라코드 추출
                        If Len(serial) > 23 Then
                            srcColorCode.Text = Mid(serial, 24)
                        End If
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING = "0100000000"

            If OPTION_RECL = "EMC" Or OPTION_RECL = "EMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "MNL" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_RECL = "IMS" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "3"
            End If
            If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 4, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If TARGET_SAB_SN = "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 5, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 5, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_VENT = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 6, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If OPTION_LSUPT = "2WAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 7, 1) = "2"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 7, 1) = "1"
            End If

            If OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN7" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "AE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "3"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "PD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "4"
            ElseIf OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN8" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "5"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", PLC_STRING)
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(12) = 1 Then
                wStep = 6
            Else
                wStep = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            'srcSerialNumber.Text = Create_Serial()
            wStep = 7

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            Tmr_Count = 0
            wStep = 8

        ElseIf wStep = 8 Then

            wStep = 9

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then ' DB 조회
            Try
                Check_DB(srcSerialNumber.Text)
                Check_Color()
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 9.1

        ElseIf wStep = 9.1 Then ' 바코드 출력
            Try
                If srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK" Then
                    If OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN7" Or OPTION_CARTYPE = "CN8" Then
                        BarCode_Print_CN7(Create_End_Barcode)
                    Else
                        Barcode_Print_AD_PD_AE()
                    End If
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 10

        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(2) = 1 Then
                Try
                    Save_DB(srcSerialNumber.Text)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
                wStep = 10.01
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 10.01 Then
            Try
                DeletePallet(RFID_TAG_ID)
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 10.02

        ElseIf wStep = 10.02 Then
            Try
                Save_Count()
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 10.03

        ElseIf wStep = 10.03 Then
            Try
                Init_Grid()
                Load_Grid()
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            wStep = 10.1

        ElseIf wStep = 10.1 Then

            LAbel_RF_CHECK.Text = "OK"
            LAbel_RF_CHECK.BackColor = Color.White
            wStep = 11

        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then


            wStep = 12

        ElseIf wStep = 12 Then

            wStep = 13

        ElseIf wStep = 13 Then

            wStep = 14

        ElseIf wStep = 14 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4550", "0000000000")
                Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
                wStep = 0
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Init_Grid()

        With Grid1

            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .DrawMode = FlexCell.DrawModeEnum.OwnerDraw
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Cols = 3
            .Rows = 1
            .FixedRows = 2
            .FrozenBottomRows = 1

            .Column(1).Locked = True
            .Column(2).Locked = True

            For i As Integer = 1 To 2

                .Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            Next

            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 220
            .Column(2).Width = 170

            .Cell(0, 1).Text = "품번"
            .Cell(0, 2).Text = "생산수량"

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_Grid()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockReadOnly

            Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,Count_ST15 FROM Table_Part WITH (NOLOCK)", Sql_Connect)

            Rs.MoveFirst()

            If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
            Else
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    If SafeInt(Rs.Fields("Count_ST15").Value) <> 0 Then
                        Grid1.AddItem(SafeStr(Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value) & Chr(9) &
                                      SafeInt(Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST15").Value))
                    End If
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Reset_Count()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Dim tmp As Integer

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,COUNT_ST15 FROM Table_Part", Sql_Connect)

            Rs.MoveFirst()
            If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
            Else
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST15").Value = "0"
                    Rs.Update()
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_Count()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Try
            Connection_Open()

            Dim tmp As Integer

            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT Part_No,COUNT_ST15 FROM Table_Part Where Part_No = '" & srcPartNo.Text & "'", Sql_Connect)

            If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
            Else
                tmp = SafeInt(Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST15").Value)

                tmp = tmp + 1

                If tmp > 20000 Then tmp = 0

                Rs.Fields("COUNT_ST15").Value = tmp

                Rs.Update()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            Try
                If Rs IsNot Nothing Then
                    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
                    Rs.Close()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End Try
    End Sub
